title: Vitamin E (Tocopherol) Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
rary: Diagnostics & Testing [Internet]. Cleveland (OH): Cleveland Clinic; c2025. Blood Tests; [reviewed 2022 Dec 06; cited 2025 Apr 1]; [about 16 screens]. Available from: https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/diagnostics/24508-blood-tests
